title: Vision 2030 Challenge 2 White Paper Available Online

description: The Vision 2030 White Paper focused on Challenge 2: Protect and Restore Ecosystems and Biodiversity, led by Marine Life 2030 leaders Frank Muller-Karger and Aileen Tan, is now available on the UN Ocea
markdown: The Vision 2030 White Paper focused on Challenge 2: Protect and Restore Ecosystems and Biodiversity, led by Marine Life 2030 leaders Frank Muller-Karger and Aileen Tan, is now available on the UN Ocean Decade website.
